common.brand_essence: Heat the part. Not the room.

home.hero_headline: Innovation in the service of | precision
home.hero_subline: MAT INDUS designs, installs and maintains custom endothermic paint booths — for automotive body shops and industrial workshops alike.
home.sectors_subtitle: Equipment designed for the specific constraints of each trade.
home.sector_auto_desc: Approved booths, VU/VL standards, premium finishes. Everything your workshop needs to paint to the highest standard.
home.sector_industry_desc: Wood, metal, plastic — booths sized for your parts, volumes and industrial processes.
home.solutions_subtitle: Complete equipment, from painting systems to energy-saving solutions.
home.why_subtitle: What sets us apart in the field.
home.why_custom_desc: Every installation is designed to your constraints: floor space, height, workload, local regulations.
home.why_accomp_desc: From feasibility study to commissioning and after-sales — one team, one responsibility.
home.why_expert_desc: Our technicians are trained and certified. Compliance checks, preventive maintenance, fast response.
home.why_energy_desc: Our hybrid and electric solutions reduce your consumption. Measurable ROI from year one.
home.realizations_subtitle: Installations completed for professionals across France.
home.process_step1_desc: We analyse your needs, space and regulatory requirements. Free, no commitment.
home.process_step2_desc: Sizing, drawings, equipment selection. You validate before anything starts.
home.process_step3_desc: Our technicians handle the assembly. Deadlines respected, clean workshop, careful commissioning.
home.process_step4_desc: Maintenance contracts, compliance checks, call-outs within 48h. We stay available.
home.cta_section_subline: Free technical study, no obligation. Reply within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Your partner in custom surface treatment equipment.

forms.message_placeholder: Available floor space, type of vehicle or part, desired timeline…
forms.success_desc: Our team will reply within 24 hours.
forms.error_desc: Please try again or contact us directly.
forms.gdpr_notice: By submitting this form, you agree to your data being used to process your request. No spam, no data resale.

simulator.modal_title_default: Gas vs Endothermic — simulate your savings
simulator.quote_teaser: Ready to switch to endothermic? Request a quote with no commitment.
simulator.section_title: Gas or endothermic — calculate your savings
simulator.section_desc: Adjust the parameters to match your workshop. Calculations are based on real technical data from our cabins.
simulator.disclaimer: Based on: gas 220.8 kWh/cycle · endothermic 21.9 kWh/cycle · CO₂ gas 0.227 · CO₂ elec 0.147 kgCO₂e/kWh (French grid).
simulator.results_prices_note: Prices used in this simulation: gas {gasPrice} €/kWh · electricity {elecPrice} €/kWh

v2.hero_supporting: Advanced paint cabin technologies combining thermal performance, operational efficiency, and ecological transition.
v2.products_title: A complete range, designed for your cycles
v2.products_subtitle: Booths, preparation stations, mixing rooms and automated systems — every piece of equipment is engineered to fit your industrial flow.
v2.product_endothermic_desc: High-performance radiant panels. Heat the part, not the room.
v2.product_gas_desc: Modular build, controlled airflow, full ICPE compliance.
v2.product_truck_desc: 15 to 20 m dimensions for buses, coaches, industrial vehicles.
v2.product_prep_desc: Sanding and filling zones with integrated extraction.
v2.product_mixing_desc: ATEX-rated spaces sized for your paint volumes.
v2.product_energy_desc: Audit, simulation and documented ROI over the full cycle.
v2.endothermic_subtitle: Instead of heating the cabin air, endothermic panels radiate heat directly onto the part. Less energy, less CO₂, more precision.
v2.endothermic_bullet_1: No combustion — no flame in the workshop
v2.endothermic_bullet_4: Reduced maintenance — no burner, no heat exchanger
v2.endothermic_bullet_5: Integration with smart grids and renewable energy
v2.ecological_title: Industry is decarbonizing. Your workshops too.
v2.ecological_subtitle: Supporting automotive and industrial workshops in their energy transition without compromising productivity.
v2.ecological_pillar_1_desc: Up to 51 tonnes of CO₂ avoided per year per endothermic installation.
v2.ecological_pillar_2_desc: Shorter cycles, reinforced insulation, heat recovery.
v2.ecological_pillar_3_desc: HEPA filtration, zero direct emissions, stable atmosphere for operators.
v2.automation_subtitle: Robotic arms, 3D scanning and intelligent trajectories — to standardize quality, reduce consumption and protect your teams.
v2.automation_principle_1_desc: Every part receives the same treatment, regardless of operator.
v2.automation_principle_2_desc: Optimized trajectories, less overspray, less waste.
v2.automation_principle_3_desc: Less solvent exposure, fewer repetitive movements.
v2.validation_subtitle: Compare gas and endothermic on your own cycle. Data sourced from cabins in production.
v2.about_title: Expertise in service of the process
v2.about_paragraph_1: MAT INDUS supports automotive and industrial professionals with high-performance painting systems engineered for operational efficiency, durability, and long-term energy transition.
v2.about_paragraph_2: Backed by deep technical expertise and a continued commitment to innovation, MAT INDUS designs, installs and maintains complete solutions adapted to modern industry standards.
